title: Product stewardship for oil benefits – supporting information
description: Information to provide with your objection or private ruling request about product stewardship for oil (PSO) benefits.

content_blocks.text: To apply for a private ruling about PSO benefits:

items: complete and submit a private ruling application form
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: To lodge an objection about PSO benefits:

items: complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: Check first whether your question is answered in Product stewardship for oil program .
Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for a private ruling or objection about PSO benefits includes:

items: a complete description of the processes you undertake in recycling or re-refining your oil including specifications of the recycled or re-refined product
the type of oil you process
if you recycle oil, the name or type of the specific oil, and the end use of the product
a copy of the verification issued by the accredited laboratory for the product (category 1 products only)
how the recycled or re-refined product will be used, sold, or disposed of
how your entitlement has been calculated
any other documents that would support the statements made in your application.

content_text:
## How to lodge
To apply for a private ruling about PSO benefits:
- complete and submit a private ruling application form
- provide the supporting information listed below.
To lodge an objection about PSO benefits:
- complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
- provide the supporting information listed below.
Check first whether your question is answered in Product stewardship for oil program .
## Supporting information
Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for a private ruling or objection about PSO benefits includes:
- a complete description of the processes you undertake in recycling or re-refining your oil including specifications of the recycled or re-refined product
- the type of oil you process
- if you recycle oil, the name or type of the specific oil, and the end use of the product
- a copy of the verification issued by the accredited laboratory for the product (category 1 products only)
- how the recycled or re-refined product will be used, sold, or disposed of
- how your entitlement has been calculated
- any other documents that would support the statements made in your application.
